title: 03 five helpers carry one open elbow gap
prompt: REFERENCE AUTHORITY — Image 1 locks Raul and Meg. Image 2 locks daylight top bleachers. Image 3 locks the opaque mango-flesh suit and graphite under-frame. Image 4 exactly locks mango helpers. INVARIANTS — Raul's real uncovered face and a credible narrow mechanical silhouette. SUBSTRATE — The upper-arm and forearm mango plates on Raul's bent right arm. INITIAL STATE — They are separated by one clean eight-inch gap; the graphite elbow connector has not arrived yet. APPLIED FORCE — Exactly five mango helpers form one straight horizontal chain across that gap. The first grips a metal loop on the upper-arm plate, each middle helper grips the next helper's hands, and the fifth grips a loop on the forearm plate. Their bodies stretch under the forearm's weight. TOPOLOGY — One gap, two loops, five helpers, four hand-to-hand links. No helpers anywhere else on the armor. The forearm hangs slightly lower, proving the chain carries load. STATE CHANGE — One small graphite connector approaches the gap from above but has not locked. SHOT PROOF — Daylight medium close profile of the bent arm occupying half the frame, with Raul and Meg's engaged faces visible behind it and every link large enough to read. LITERALIZATION HAZARDS / VETO — no decorative garland, necklace, grape characters, helper crowd, complete elbow joint, helpers sitting on armor, bodybuilder suit, plastic surface, crushing or pain.

resolved_params.system_prompt: Create one polished cinematic live-action Peelerz commercial styleframe, not a collage or design sheet. Obey the countable mechanical specification before making the frame pretty. Keep one causal action readable through physical contact, tension, attached edges, and a visible active boundary. Preserve declared reference authorities. No captions, labels, watermarks, invented packaging, gore, weapons, generic gummy bears, generic magical glow, or unexplained finished transformations.
